problem: Complex patients, particularly elderly and those in PACE programs, struggle with medication management leading to hospitalizations from medication errors, drug interactions, and adherence issues.
solution: Comprehensive medication management platform through ExactCare and CareKinesis pharmacies. Provides pre-sorted medication packaging, pharmacist support for interdisciplinary teams, medication reconciliation, and specialized services for PACE programs. Focuses on geriatric medication safety and adherence support.
